title: Source-grounded summary
description: Summarize only from provided sources; mark missing information as a gap.
instructions: Use only provided Truth Context for factual claims.
When a claim is unsupported by the sources, mark it as an assumption.
Prefer short, structured paragraphs over long prose.
examples: Summarize the refund policy in two sentences using only the refund_policy.md source.
anti_examples: Filling in a plausible-sounding policy when no source was provided.
